title: Bayesian Spatial SAR SC vs the Mendez / Sakaguchi-Tagawa California Prop 99 tutorial
paper: Sakaguchi & Tagawa (2026), The Econometrics Journal, doi:10.1093/ectj/utag006
reference_impl: Mendez tutorial Rcpp helpers (cmg777/starter-academic-v501), an 'inspired-by' variant; https://carlos-mendez.org/post/r_sc_bayes_spatial/
command: SAR_HELPERS_DIR=<dir with cmg777 helpers + california_smoking.rda> Rscript benchmarks/reference/spillsynth_prop99_sar/reference.R
